about.name: Loc Nguyen
about.profile: Software Engineer with experience in backend and frontend web development, specializing in scalable APIs, transaction workflows, real-time applications, and business management systems. Proficient in NestJS, Go, React, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB, with a strong focus on writing clean, maintainable, and reliable software.
about.contact: The easiest way to connect with me:

projects.title: Centralized Wallet
projects.summary: Developed a backend API for centralized wallet operations supporting transaction on multiple networks
projects.technologies: NestJS, PostgresQL, CockroachDB, Clickhouse, OTEL, Permify, RabbitMQ, Ably.
responsibilities: Wallet management and balance tracking across multiple blockchains.

Implemented real-time transaction processing for internal transfers, withdrawals, deposits, and swaps, including balance updates via message queue handlers, rollback mechanisms for failed transactions, and real-time notifications.
Built and integrated a financial fraud detection and transaction monitoring system by implementing a Sentinel platform for real-time transaction analysis and monitoring.
Designed and implemented permission system using Permify RBAC service with feature-based access control, ensuring secure API endpoints for dashboard operations.

projects.title: Real-time Chat & Social Platform
projects.summary: Implemented features including posts, approving management and reel-time notifications.
projects.technologies: Go (Gin), MongoDB, Peertube, R2 Cloudflare, NATs.
responsibilities: Post Management: Multi-format post creation supporting images, text content, and rich media with metadata
Reels Management: Comprehensive reel system supporting video uploads, article-based reels, and scheduled publishing
Comment Management: Dynamic comment creation and management
Playlist Management: Dynamic playlist creation and management
Approval Workflow: Content moderation system with approval management for reels
Notifications: Real-time push notifications for likes, comments, and content updates

highlights: Collaborated with teammates to develop and convert the frontend for POS System Viet247.vn.

ems.title: EMS
ems.name: Quizzes & Exam papers management system
ems.body: Developed a management system for managing quizzes and exam papers and automatic generation of exam papers, and provided data management support for the system.

lms.title: LMS
lms.name: Laboratory management system
lms.body: A RESTful API system have been designed to manage lab equipment, tools, and chemicals. The system provides a comfortable way to transfer, borrow, and return items in management processing.

abacNestjs.title: DDD
abacNestjs.name: Domain-Driven Design Nest Template
abacNestjs.body: An Attributes-Based Access Control system built with NestJS implementing Domain-Driven Design principles. Features multi-tenant architecture, policy-based authorization using JSON Logic, JWT authentication, and comprehensive role management with complex condition evaluation for fine-grained access control.
